title: helichrysum pallasii var. psychrophilum
intro: Helichrysum pallasii var. psychrophilum, also known as the mountain everlast, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum pallasii var. psychrophilum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health conditions.
